'''Cather''' was one of three [[moon]]s that [[orbit]]ed the [[planet]] of [[Saleucami]], in the [[Suolriep sector]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]. It owed its [[Color|greenish]] hue to the [[crystal]]line dust in its [[atmosphere]].<ref name="SWTVE" />

{{Moon-stub}}
